item.title: About Me
item.description: About Me Hi, I’m Gautam Singh, a 3rd senior at the Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Kolkata, pursuing a 5-year BS-MS dual degree program with a major in Mathematics and a minor in Computer Science. My academic journey, combined with a strong passion for computational techniques, has allowed me to delve into a wide array of topics, from real analysis to graph algorithms. Here, I share my thoughts, notes, and insights on the subjects that fascinate me, with a focus on mathematics, machine learning, and algorithm design.
